name: clawops
description: Lean internal ops layer for OpenClaw

scripts.test:smoke: node -e "const { loadConfig } = require('./src/config'); const c = loadConfig(); if (!c.server || !c.collector) throw new Error('config failed'); console.log('config-ok');" && node -e "const { createBundledCodexPlugin } = require('./src/plugins/codex'); const { loadConfig } = require('./src/config'); const plugin = createBundledCodexPlugin(loadConfig()); if (!plugin || plugin.id !== 'bundled-codex') throw new Error('plugin failed'); console.log('plugin-ok');" && node -e "const { createApp } = require('./src/server/app'); const { loadConfig } = require('./src/config'); const { createBundledCodexPlugin } = require('./src/plugins/codex'); const config = loadConfig(); config.plugins = { codex: createBundledCodexPlugin(config) }; const app = createApp(config); if (typeof app.get !== 'function') throw new Error('app failed'); console.log('app-ok');" && npm run test:x-reader
scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const roots=['src']; let bad=[]; const walk=(p)=>{ for (const e of fs.readdirSync(p,{withFileTypes:true})) { const fp=path.join(p,e.name); if (e.isDirectory()) walk(fp); else if (e.isFile() && fp.endsWith('.js')) { const t=fs.readFileSync(fp,'utf8'); if (t.includes('	')) bad.push(fp + ': tab character found'); } } }; roots.forEach(walk); if (bad.length) { console.error(bad.join('\n')); process.exit(1); } console.log('lint-ok');"
scripts.test:x-reader: node -e "const { buildBrowserReaderPlan } = require('./src/x-reader'); const plan = buildBrowserReaderPlan('https://x.com/openclaw/status/123'); if (!plan.ok || plan.mode !== 'browser-first') throw new Error('x-reader failed'); console.log('x-reader-ok');"
